ClientApiManager: _do_call_method(): got error: "server method call err: \"api method error: Network(\
    hyper_util::client::legacy::Error(\
        Connect,\
        ConnectError(\
            \\\"tcp connect error\\\",\
            127.0.0.1:8123,\
            Os {\
                code: 111,\
                kind: ConnectionRefused,\
                message: \\\"Connection refused\\\",\

)\""
